markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Negotiate partnership terms and pricing between GrowthX and Redis, addressing concerns and clarifying ROI expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Redis seeks clearer ROI projections and potentially lower pricing for GrowthX's content strategy and execution services](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [GrowthX offered a reduced price of $30k for strategy sprint and $25k/month for execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Andy (Redis) expressed concerns about the high cost relative to their marketing budget and requested more concrete ROI estimates](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide ROI projections and customer references to help Redis evaluate the partnership's potential value](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Pricing and Contract Structure

  - [GrowthX initially offered $40k for strategy sprint, $30k/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Reduced offer: $30k for strategy sprint, $25k/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Total contract value: \~$330k for strategy sprint + 12 months execution](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Redis concerned about high cost (\>30% of total marketing SaaS budget)](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasized this is a services engagement, not a SaaS product](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### ROI Expectations and Justification

  - [Redis requested clear ROI projections (e.g., organic traffic increase, conversion improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [GrowthX unable to contractually guarantee specific ROI figures](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Andy seeking data to justify potential trade-offs (e.g., reducing digital ad spend)](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide ROI scenarios and quarterly milestone projections by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [Strategy sprint (8 weeks) aims to build operational muscle and establish content quality bar](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Targeting \~10 content pieces per week during execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Includes context engineering, persona development, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Procurement and Timeline

  - [Original kickoff date of August 25th likely unrealistic](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Redis estimates 3 full business weeks for contract processing](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [High-level approval likely needed due to contract value](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [GrowthX's suggestion of partial commitment (strategy sprint only) not feasible for Redis](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide ROI projections and scenarios by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [GrowthX to connect Redis with customer references for anecdotal feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Redis to send over NDA and MSA documentation to start paperwork process](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Both parties to continue negotiations based on ROI projections and reference feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Adjust timeline expectations, moving away from August 25th kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/oLNmap1aZy7aLvSP33xvxEn7Ha5VGxV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
